# Test: apx link python — virtualenv detection and Go hint
#
# Verifies link command behavior without a virtualenv and the Go redirect.

# Setup
mkdir app
cd app
exec git init
exec apx init app --org=testorg --repo=myapp --non-interactive internal/apis/proto/services/users
exec apx add proto/payments/ledger/v1@v1.2.3

# link python without VIRTUAL_ENV should fail
! exec apx link python
stderr 'no active virtualenv'

# link go should redirect to apx sync
exec apx link go
stdout 'apx sync'

# link unsupported language should fail
! exec apx link java
stderr 'unsupported language'
